description: You are a pharmacy technician assisting with a medication review. Using the patient file at /home/ga/Desktop/patient_medications.txt (listing Warfarin, Lisinopril, and Metformin), research potential drug interactions using authoritative government medical databases. Download an official patient information sheet or drug label for one of the medications. Create a browser Favorites folder named 'Patient Safety References' containing at least two bookmarked reference pages. Write a safety report summarizing known interactions and precautions for this combination, citing your sources, to /home/ga/Desktop/drug_interaction_report.txt.
